action.reasoning:
Observation: DDP run failing with exitcode 1 but no Python traceback. Need to capture actual error. Let me run with stderr captured better - run torchrun with --redirects to get the real error. Or just run with python directly first via a single-rank test using torchrun --nproc_per_node=1.

Decision: Run with torchrun nproc=1 and look at the actual Python error.
action.command: cd /workspace && RAB_ITERATION=test torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=1 train.py --epochs 1 --batch_size 2 --num_workers 2 2>err.log; tail -80 err.log
